headline: Is Jack Henry And Associates (JKHY) Fairly Priced After Recent Share Price Swings?
summary: If you are wondering whether Jack Henry & Associates at around US$165 a share is offering fair value, this article will walk through what that price could be implying. The stock has seen mixed returns, with a 2.0% decline over the last 7 days, a 4.2% gain over the last 30 days, and returns of a 7.3% decline year to date and a 3.1% decline over the past year, set against longer term gains of 16.9% over 3 years and 13.4% over 5 years. Recent coverage has focused on how Jack Henry & Associates...

headline: A Look At Jack Henry & Associates (JKHY) Valuation After Q2 2026 Growth And Tap2Local Recognition
summary: Jack Henry & Associates (JKHY) is back in focus after Q2 2026 results coincided with a 4.6% share price move, supported by 7.9% revenue growth and fresh recognition for its Tap2Local payments solution. See our latest analysis for Jack Henry & Associates. The recent 4.6% one day share price move around Q2 results sits against a mixed backdrop, with a 30 day share price return of 3.9%, a 90 day share price return of 10.8%, and a 1 year total shareholder return of 3.1%.
